name: Length of Cycle in Linked List
description: Given a linked list that may contain a cycle, find the length of the cycle. If no cycle exists, return 0. Use Floyd's algorithm to find the meeting point, then count nodes in the cycle.
constraints: The number of nodes is in [0, 10^4]. -10^5 <= Node.val <= 10^5.

performance.stress_intent: exercise long cycle and no-cycle lists that punish repeated full traversals to re-measure cycle length from many entry guesses
